steps.title: Undo the outside multiplier
steps.content:
Start with $3\sqrt{5x}=15$. Divide both sides by $3$:
$$\sqrt{5x}=5$$

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content:
The question asks for $10x$, so use $x=5$:
$$10x=10(5)=50$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $50$ matches Choice B — $50$. The question asks for $10x$, not for $x$ itself, so stopping at $x=5$ would be one step short.
